description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Feelpp CI that runs on every pull request to any branch and on push to master and develop branches. The workflow has multiple jobs: check_skip to evaluate skip conditions based on commit messages; feelpp to build Feelpp on various environments if conditions are met; testsuite, toolboxes, mor, and python to run tests, build toolboxes, MOR, and Python components respectively, each dependent on previous jobs and conditions.
